email_body:
Beste AppCritica-team,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content & SEO Specialist. Uw missie om een transparant AI-ecosysteem te bouwen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentcreatie.

Bij Episto optimaliseer ik on-page SEO en schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs voor klantwebsites. Daarnaast beheer ik WordPress-sites met Elementor en analyseer ik prestaties via SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Search Console. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com implementeerde ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entity-optimalisatie en GEO-technieken om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Ik werk in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben gewend aan remote werk.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop snel van u te horen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear AppCritica team,

I am very excited to apply for the Content & SEO Specialist position. Your mission to build a transparent AI ecosystem aligns perfectly with my background in SEO, GEO, and content creation.

At Episto, I manage on-page SEO and write keyword-targeted blogs for client websites. I also build and maintain WordPress sites with Elementor and track performance using SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines.

I work in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am comfortable working remotely.

I have attached my CV and cover letter. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Toen ik de vacature voor Content & SEO Specialist bij AppCritica zag, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw platform helpt gebruikers de juiste AI-tools te vinden via eerlijke reviews — en dat is precies waar ik in geloof: transparantie en kwaliteit in technologie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en WordPress-beheer. Ik schrijf blogs die organisch verkeer aantrekken, optimaliseer meta-tags en structureer data met JSON-LD. Daarnaast analyseer ik prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Search Console. Mijn ervaring met GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) heb ik opgedaan op mirook.com, waar ik entity-optimalisatie en llms.txt implementeerde om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Wat mij aanspreekt in AppCritica is de focus op AI en innovatie. Uw team heeft jarenlange ervaring in AI, automatisering en softwareontwikkeling — ik wil graag van die expertise leren. Tegelijkertijd breng ik een technische basis mee (front-end ervaring met AngularJS, WordPress-bouw) en een groeiende passie voor analytics en contentstrategie.

Ik werk zelfstandig en gestructureerd, ben gewend aan remote samenwerking, en spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks. Mijn Nederlands is B1, maar ik volg actief lessen om dit te verbeteren. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel in werktijden.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek verder toe te lichten. Bedankt voor uw tijd.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok

--- English version ---

Dear selection committee,

When I saw the vacancy for Content & SEO Specialist at AppCritica, I felt an immediate connection. Your platform helps users find the right AI tools through honest reviews — and that is exactly what I believe in: transparency and quality in technology.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress management. I write blogs that attract organic traffic, optimize meta tags, and structure data with JSON-LD. I also track performance using SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console. My experience with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) comes from mirook.com, where I implemented entity optimization and llms.txt to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines.

What appeals to me about AppCritica is the focus on AI and innovation. Your team has years of experience in AI, automation, and software development — I want to learn from that expertise. At the same time, I bring a technical foundation (front-end experience with AngularJS, WordPress building) and a growing passion for analytics and content strategy.

I work independently and in a structured way, am used to remote collaboration, and speak fluent English and Turkish. My Dutch is B1, but I am actively taking lessons to improve. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible with working hours.

I hope to further explain my motivation and skills in an interview. Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and technical SEO audits for client websites at Episto
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and structured data implementation on mirook.com
- WordPress site building with Elementor and Astra theme, including content management
- Proficient in SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console for performance tracking
- B1 Dutch with active language classes; based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
